homeHeroHighlights: Turnkey finishing and renovation: Zhlobin, Gomel region and travel throughout Belarus
Executive level of finishing, fixed estimate and deadlines
Design, supply and supervision in one loop

homeVideoSpotlight.title: On-site work format
homeVideoSpotlight.description: When a branded video appears, specify its `youtubeId` in the data - the section will be connected automatically.

home.question: Do you work only in Zhlobin?
home.answer: We are based in Zhlobin and Gomel region; We carry out complex projects throughout Belarus - we coordinate the surveyor’s visit and estimates individually.

home.question: What is included in the turnkey package?
home.answer: Design or working documentation, estimate, purchase of materials according to specifications, execution of work, cleaning and delivery of the facility with a 24-month guarantee.

home.question: What price level?
home.answer: The reference point is the executive segment: transparent estimates, branded materials and quality control at every stage without hidden surcharges.

home.question: How to start a project?
home.answer: Get a quote or call - we will coordinate an engineer’s visit, measurements and a commercial proposal with a work schedule.

home.question: Is it possible to fix the budget before the start of work?
home.answer: Yes, after measurements and approval of the technical specifications, we prepare a detailed estimate with stage-by-stage costs. This allows you to see your budget in advance and make decisions without unexpected additional payments.

home.question: How long does a turnkey project take?
home.answer: The period depends on the area and complexity, but we always fix the schedule by stages: design, supplies, construction and finishing works, final delivery and quality control.

home.question: Do you help with the selection and purchase of materials?
home.answer: Yes, we create specifications, select items to suit your budget and style, check delivery times and synchronize purchases with the team’s schedule so as not to slow down the project.

home.question: What do I get after completing the project?
home.answer: You receive a ready-made space that can be used immediately: work completed under the contract, a clean object after cleaning, a package of closing documents and a 24-month warranty.

design.question: How long does a design project take?
design.answer: Depends on the area and package (from concept to full taxiway); A typical deadline is discussed in the brief and recorded in the calendar plan.

design.question: Is it possible to order only visualization?
design.answer: Yes - we will select the volume: from moodboard and 3D to a full set of drawings and specifications for builders.

design.question: How to coordinate style and budget?
design.answer: At the start, we fix priorities and the budget corridor; We select materials and furniture within the approved budget.

design.question: Do you provide designer supervision?
design.answer: Yes - control of compliance of implementation with the project at the site, stage reports and consultations with contractors.

repairs.question: Do you do renovations without a designer?
repairs.answer: Yes, according to the customer’s working documentation or our standard methodology, we will estimate the volume and offer a schedule and estimate.

repairs.question: How do you guarantee deadlines?
repairs.answer: We prescribe the stages in the contract, assign a responsible foreman and photo reports; deviations will be agreed upon in advance.

repairs.question: Do you purchase materials?
repairs.answer: We can take over the supply according to the specifications - volumes and payments are transparently reflected in the estimate.

repairs.question: Do you work with legal entities?
repairs.answer: Yes - contract, closing documents; for tenders we provide permits and insurance upon request.

companyAbout.intro: Premium Design is a design and production team in Zhlobin. We implement residential and commercial interiors of the premium segment in Belarus: from concept to turnkey delivery.

milestones.text: Launch of complex projects in the region: apartments and local retail.
Expansion to fit-out and representative objects with a single outline of the estimate.
A single ecosystem: design, supply, repair, supervision and 24 month warranty.

team.name: Project office
team.note: Concept, visualizations, working drawings and specifications before the start of construction.

team.name: Production block
team.note: Work schedule, quality control, budget discipline and delivery of the object to the customer.

companyAbout.licensesNote: We work under a contract. Approvals, insurance and tender documentation are available upon request for corporate customers.

items: We fix the estimate and deadlines before the start - no hidden extras during the process.
Executive level of finishing and materials, 24 month warranty on work.
Zhlobin and Gomel region; travel and support of projects in Belarus.

news.title: Summer discounts on renovations and interior design - limited offer!
news.text: Hurry up to take advantage of our summer promotion and get a discount of up to 20% on the renovation and design of your interior. Create comfort and style in your home at an affordable price. Fill out the application form right now!

news.title: Turnkey interior design at a discount - limited offer!
news.text: Do you want to completely update your interior? Order a turnkey design from us and get a 15% discount. We will develop a unique design, carry out renovations and select furniture - everything you need to create the ideal space.

news.title: Free delivery of materials when ordering repairs and interior design!
news.text: Remodeling and interior design not only transform your home, but also cost money. We will help you save on material delivery - it will be free when you order a comprehensive service. Applying on the website will only take a few minutes!

news.title: Paint your home - discount on wall painting!
news.text: Want to refresh your interior? Order wall painting from us and get a 10% discount. We use only high-quality materials and offer a wide range of colors. Call us or Get a quote on the website!

news.title: A cozy nest for your child - a children's room at a discount!
news.text: Do you want to create a magical atmosphere in your child's room? Order the design and renovation of a children's room from us and receive a 10% discount. We will make the room functional, safe and inspiring for your little one.

news.title: Turn your kitchen into a culinary movie - discount on kitchen design and renovation!
news.text: The kitchen is the place where masterpieces are born. Make your kitchen stylish and functional with our services. Order kitchen design and renovation from us and get a 15% discount. Let your culinary imagination run wild!

homeType.title: We make dreams come true: the interior of your dreams - without compromise!
homeType.description: Welcome to the company where your ideas are turned into stylish and functional spaces! We combine design, renovation and innovation to create a home you'll love coming back to every day.
questions: What makes your home welcoming and reflective of your personality?
Why does a professional approach save time and money?
What details make a renovation or design project truly stand out?
How do we guarantee 100% results and meeting deadlines?
Why do friends and partners recommend us?
homeType.tips: Turn your dream into reality! Check out our projects and start transforming your space today. Success starts with the first step - take it right now!

designType.title: Welcome to the world of renovation and design, where your dreams of an ideal interior become a reality!
designType.description: We offer comprehensive solutions for creating stylish and cozy interiors. Our specialists work with attention to detail to ensure that your ideas are implemented as accurately and efficiently as possible.
questions: Why should you entrust repairs and design to professionals?
What stages does our approach to creating an ideal interior include?
How do we help save time and budget?
What makes our projects unique and modern?
Where can I see finished projects?
designType.tips: Visit our catalog of projects, learn more about our services and contact us to take the first step towards your ideal interior!

repairType.title: High-quality turnkey repairs - comfort without unnecessary hassle!
repairType.description: Our comprehensive renovation is a full cycle of work, from assessing the premises to arranging furniture. With us you will get the perfect result on time and at a fixed cost.
questions: What work needs to be done to update the interior?
How to choose materials to ensure durability and style?
What technologies will speed up repairs and save you money?
How to meet deadlines and budget?
Why do we guarantee quality and reliability?
repairType.tips: Check out our work to see the quality! Choose the option that suits you, and we will implement it with maximum precision.

portfolioType.title: Premium Design Portfolio: real projects with measurable results
portfolioType.description: The portfolio contains residential and commercial properties, where we were responsible for design, renovation and quality control. These are not renderings, but completed work with a clear logic of decisions and materials.
questions: Which style and level of finish do you prefer?
What layouts and life scenarios are implemented in similar properties?
How do we address storage, light and ergonomics without overwhelming the space?
Which materials have proven to perform better in operation?
How to repeat strong solutions in your project, taking into account the budget?
portfolioType.tips: Select 2-3 projects that resonate with you and Get a quote: we will prepare a personal concept and implementation roadmap specifically for your project.

estimateType.title: Cost guide: a quick look at your budget without unnecessary bureaucracy
estimateType.description: A preliminary calculation helps to estimate the range of repair and finishing costs at an early stage. You see a clear starting point to plan your budget, milestones and priorities without uncertainty.
questions: What project format do you need: basic, comfort or premium?
How does the estimate change with different areas and scope of work?
What affects cost the most: materials, engineering or timing?
How to distribute the budget between mandatory and desirable decisions?
How to move from a preliminary calculation to an accurate estimate for an object?
estimateType.tips: Make a preliminary calculation in the form of an estimate and send a request: we will clarify the parameters of the object and prepare a detailed estimate with payment stages and deadlines.

aboutType.title: Why do clients choose us? Find out about our advantages!
aboutType.description:
Key advantages of our company:
We are a team of professionals with many years of experience in renovation and interior design. We offer:

Individual approach to each project.
Use of modern technologies and materials.
A portfolio of successful projects and rave reviews from clients.
Our work is a combination of aesthetics, comfort and functionality. We create spaces that inspire.
questions: How does our company differ from competitors?
How do we guarantee 100% quality and meeting deadlines?
What benefits do our clients receive?
Why do hundreds of customers trust us?
Where can I see examples of our completed projects?
aboutType.tips: Take a look at our portfolio and get inspired by ideas for your interior. We are ready to create the space of your dreams!

stepsWork.title: You Get a quote
stepsWork.description: A specialist will call you back within 15 minutes. You discuss your future renovation and ask questions.

stepsWork.title: An estimate engineer comes to you
stepsWork.description: It takes a measurement within 30 minutes. After 12 hours, you receive an accurate estimate indicating the timing and cost of the work.

stepsWork.title: We conclude a contract
stepsWork.description: The contract specifies the cost and terms. For each day of delay, a fine is prescribed.

stepsWork.title: We purchase materials
stepsWork.description: We work directly with suppliers. Therefore, we provide you with a discount from 5 to 30%.

stepsWork.title: Let's get started
stepsWork.description: Within 48 hours after signing the contract, work at the site will begin to begin.

stepsWork.title: We bring order and cleanliness
stepsWork.description: The apartment is washed to a shine. You can immediately move into the renovated apartment.

relatedServices.title: Construction expertise
relatedServices.subTitle: We will conduct an examination of the condition of your home and suggest improvements to increase its value and safety.
relatedServices.description: Increase the value of your home and ensure security with our services. We will examine the condition of your home and offer solutions to increase its value and safety. Our experts can help you identify potential problems that could affect your home in the future and offer actionable recommendations to improve its condition.
benefits: Increasing the value of your home
relatedServices.text: Feel confident in your home. A real estate examination is a step towards improving its condition, and therefore its value. Our experts will offer you practical solutions to improve the durability and safety of your home. Get an expert opinion that will not only improve your family's safety, but also add value to your property.
triggers: Confidence in your property: We provide you with accurate information about the condition of your home.
Family Safety and Security: We care about your home and your safety.
Guaranteed increase in value: Increase the value of your home based on recommendations from professionals.

relatedServices.title: Smart home and automation
relatedServices.subTitle: We will install smart home systems: lighting, climate control, security and control from your phone.
relatedServices.description: Transform your home with future technology. Installing smart home systems will provide convenience, comfort and full control via a smartphone. You can control the lighting, climate control and security of your home with the touch of a button.
relatedServices.text: Bring the future into your home. Smart home systems give you maximum convenience: from lighting control to security control, with just one device. Forget about inconvenience and make your home more comfortable, economical and safe.
triggers: Modern technology for convenience: Improve your home with the latest solutions.
Saving resources and safety: A smart home will save your resources and make your home safer.
Remote control: Anywhere - complete control of your home.

relatedServices.title: Energy saving and ecology
relatedServices.subTitle: We design and install energy saving solutions, including solar panels, heating and ventilation systems at minimal cost.
relatedServices.description: Make your home greener and more efficient with our energy saving solutions. We will help you reduce your energy costs by implementing solutions for installing solar panels and heating and ventilation systems. This will not only save you money, but will also contribute to protecting the environment.
relatedServices.text: Make your home not only comfortable, but also environmentally friendly! The introduction of energy-saving technologies is an important step towards conserving natural resources and reducing energy costs. We offer you the best solutions for your home that will provide you with long-term savings and a positive impact on the environment.
triggers: Going Green: Take a step towards a cleaner, greener world.
Energy efficiency and savings: Energy saving solutions will reduce your costs.
Investing in the future: Invest in technologies that will pay dividends in the long term.

relatedServices.title: Technical documentation
relatedServices.subTitle: We will develop detailed documentation for the installation of electrical networks, water supply, heating and lighting.
relatedServices.description: Ensure safety and compliance with all standards with our technical documentation. We develop detailed documentation for all aspects of construction: from electrical networks to water supply. This will allow you to minimize risks during construction and be sure that all work complies with current standards.
relatedServices.text: Get complete documentation for your project. We will ensure accuracy and compliance with all construction standards, which will minimize risks and ensure the successful implementation of your project. Professional specialists will help you avoid mistakes and implement the project without problems.
triggers: Professionalism and Accuracy: We guarantee that the documentation will be of the highest level.
Reduce Construction Risks: Accurate documentation is your path to a successful project.
Compliance with Laws: All documentation will comply with laws.

relatedServices.title: Selection and ordering of materials
relatedServices.subTitle: We will select and deliver finishing and rough materials for renovation, as well as furniture, plumbing and lighting.
relatedServices.description: A full range of materials for your renovation: from construction to finishing. We will help you select and deliver all the necessary materials for your project, including furniture, plumbing and lighting.
benefits: Unified specification and order to suppliers
Control of delivery times according to the work schedule
relatedServices.text: We will take care of all materials for your renovation - from construction to finishing. Our company provides a full range of services, including delivery and selection of quality materials, to ensure that your project is successful and completed on time.
triggers: Quality guarantee: We offer only high-quality and proven materials.
Convenience and speed: All materials will be delivered as quickly as possible.
Availability of the best materials: You will have access to the best materials for your renovation.

relatedServices.title: Construction waste removal and cleaning
relatedServices.subTitle: We will remove construction waste and do wet cleaning. You will receive a clean property ready to move.
relatedServices.description: After renovation - clean! We'll take care of the trash removal and cleaning of your property so it's ready to move in or use. Don't waste time and effort on cleaning - we will do everything for you!
benefits: Readiness of the premises for use
relatedServices.text: Have your home ready to move in or use as soon as your renovation is complete. We will rid you of construction debris and provide thorough cleaning so that you can enjoy cleanliness and comfort without unnecessary hassle.
triggers: Clean and tidy: We ensure that your home is ready for use.
Ready to use: Clear your space of clutter and make it livable.
Minimize Effort: Let us take care of the dirty work and leave you happy with the results.

callToAction.headline: Why choose us?
reasons: We have more than 10 years of experience in working with business spaces.
We create projects that increase sales and attract customers.
Full cycle of work: from development to implementation.
Use of modern materials and technologies for durability and comfort.
